Article Title: Fears of early summer recede, wet spells likely in North till March-end
Article Text:
Poll How do you feel about the unexpected snowfall in the higher hills? It's a pleasant surprise! It's concerning for the season ahead.

NEW DELHI: The rapid rise in heat in the first half of March, leading to the spectre of an early and long summer in north India, appears to have halted for at least the next two weeks. While an ongoing weather system is bringing rain to north India, two more are expected to impact the region this month, ensuring that temperatures remain normal to below normal, the met department said.The wet spell, which began around March 14 with a western disturbance, marks a sudden turn in the weather after a particularly dry winter in the region and high temperatures since mid-Feb. It's bringing not just rain but also much needed snow in the higher hills ahead of summer. Among other things, the forest fire season in Uttarakhand and Himachal Pradesh is expected to be pushed back by weeks. Delhi is set to experience the unusual likelihood of the second half of March being cooler than the first.There’s an ongoing western disturbance that’s going to impact northwest India till around March 21. Another active western disturbance is likely to start impacting the region from around March 23 and a third one from around March 27. We expect temperatures to be in the normal to below-normal range. The heatwaves have subsided,” said Mrutyunjay Mohapatra, chief of India Meteorological Department If IMD’s forecast of two more active WDs affecting north India holds true, it would take the number of these wet-weather systems in the second half of March to four.The current WD caused widespread rain and snow, is expected to continue impacting the region for the next two-three days.The chill has returned in the hilly regions, which bear the maximum impact of the weather disturbances.The maximum temperature in Srinagar dropped from 19.4 degrees C on March 14 to a forecasted 11 degrees C on Wednesday as fresh snow-fall in Gulmarg and Sonamarg brought unexpected bonanza for tourists. Last month, Srinagar had logged its warmest Feb on record.The higher reaches of Himachal recorded fresh snowfall while the low and midhills saw light to moderate rain. An alert has been issued for heavy rain and snow on Thursday. Tabo in Lahaul Spiti recorded a minimum temperature of -2.8 degrees C.In Delhi, the day temperature had on March 11 hit a peak of 36.8 degrees C, 8.4 notches above normal. By March 15, the maximum had dropped to 30.1 degrees C. It’s expected to dip to around 27 degrees C by Friday.
Article Summary: An ongoing weather system is bringing rain to north India. Two more are expected to impact the region this month, ensuring that temperatures remain normal to below normal. Delhi is set to experience the unusual likelihood of the second half of March being cooler than the first.

Article Title: From Lok Sabha MP to assembly poll debut: Why Congress is betting big on Gaurav Gogoi in Assam
Article Text:
Congress leader and Jorhat MP Gaurav Gogoi (File photo)

Assam assembly elections 2026

Watch Congress MP Pradyut Bordoloi Joins BJP, Assam Politics Sees Major Shake-Up Ahead of Assembly Elections Congress MP Pradyut Bordoloi Joins BJP, Assam Politics Sees Major Shake-Up Ahead of Assembly Elections

Poll What factor do you think will influence the outcome of the elections in Assam the most? Candidate Popularity Voter Sentiment

Change of political landscape in Assam

Assam assembly elections 2021

Vote share Assam assembly elections 2021

Gaurav Gogoi: Congress’ most well-known face from

Assam

Gaurav Gogoi

Attempt to capitalise on Tarun Gogoi’s legacy?

Tarun Gogoi

How Gaurav Gogoi’s Jorhat candidature carries weight

The Muslim vote

Congress taking the fight to Himanta Sarma?

No cakewalk for Congress and Gaurav Gogoi

NEW DELHI: The Congress has made a major move to boost its prospects in Assam as it attempts to return to power in the state after a decade. The party has fielded its state unit chief, Gaurav Gogoi, currently an MP from Jorhat, to contest his first state election from the assembly constituency of the same name.That the grand old party is leaving no stone unturned in its bid to wrest Assam from the BJP became evident when it appointed Priyanka Gandhi Vadra to lead the candidate screening committee in the state. The candidature of Gogoi is another step in that direction.As per Congress sources, the leadership wants him to be its chief ministerial face.But what might be the party's strategy in fielding its incumbent state chief — and a sitting MP — in the assembly polls, and positioning him as a potential CM contender?For long, the Congress had been the dominant political force in Assam. Even in its most recent stint, it secured three consecutive terms, 15 years, under the leadership of Tarun Gogoi, one of its tallest leaders in Assam and the state’s longest-serving chief minister, with a tenure lasting from 2001 to 2016. Gaurav Gogoi is his son.In fact, when the BJP finally unseated its arch-rival and formed its first government in Assam in 2016, one of the strategists behind the victory was a former Congressman, Himanta Biswa Sarma, who had joined the BJP just the previous year.Following the BJP government’s re-election five years on, Sarma was made the chief minister. His political nous has also seen him become a key architect of the saffron party’s recent dominance in the northeast.The BJP’s rise changed Assam’s political landscape. The Congress now hopes Gaurav Gogoi can help it regain ground.Since the demise of his father in 2020, the 43-year-old has emerged as the Congress’ most prominent face in Assam. His importance to the party is reflected in the responsibilities entrusted to him—deputy leader of the opposition in the Lok Sabha and president of the Assam Pradesh Congress Committee.Gogoi has risen quickly despite being in politics for just over a decade. Born and educated in Delhi, and later in the United States, where he pursued higher studies, he began his political career by joining the grand-old party in 2014 and went on to win Assam’s Kaliabor Lok Sabha seat. He retained the seat in the 2019 general elections.Since becoming the deputy leader of the opposition in the Lok Sabha, he has also led parliamentary debates on several key issues, underscoring his growing prominence within the party.The former CM remains a towering figure in Assam, widely revered for his leadership. Popularly known as "Jana Neta" (leader of the masses), he was posthumously awarded the prestigious Padma Bhushan — India’s third-highest civilian honour — on Republic Day 2021, just two months after his passing.A Union minister under then-Prime Minister PV Narasimha Rao, he held Assam Congress’ leadership twice: 1986-1990 and 1996-2002.The Congress has lacked strong leadership in Assam since he stepped back following the 2016 poll defeat. Now, more than five years after his death, and perhaps sensing anti-incumbency against the BJP-led government after two consecutive terms, the party appears to be placing its bets on the son.By entrusting Gaurav with state leadership and fielding him in the assembly elections, the Congress could well be banking on the father’s legacy to reclaim power.That Jorhat is Gogoi’s home district and his parliamentary constituency is certainly a significant advantage. In the 2024 general elections, after shifting from his Kaliabor seat, he won Jorhat by more than 1.4 lakh votes against the then-sitting BJP MP, Topon Kumar Gogoi, even as the Modi wave swept Assam for a third consecutive Lok Sabha election.Yet, the Congress’ strategy of fielding him from the Jorhat assembly is based on a different calculation.With Sarma repeatedly branding it as a party reliant on "Miyas" (migrant Muslims of Bangladeshi origin), the Congress is now seeking to shed the "Miya" vote-bank label, according to an Assam Congress leader.The leader added that Gogoi’s candidacy would also energise Congress cadres to challenge the BJP.Jorhat is a prominent upper Assam seat where indigenous tribes and communities remain a deciding factor in elections, unlike many constituencies in lower and central Assam where Muslims have a significant presence.Yet, a pre-poll survey indicates that the Muslim vote is likely to remain with the Congress.A January opinion poll by Vote Vibe indicated that Gogoi is the overwhelming favourite for the chief minister’s post among Muslim voters. 79% Muslims respondents expressed support for Gogoi, while only 10% backed Sarma for the post.This stands in contrast to the overall findings, where 48% of respondents supported Sarma and 42% favoured Gogoi.In 2021, too, the community had preferred the Congress-led Mahajot coalition.Out of Assam’s 35 districts, 11 have a Muslim population exceeding 50%. In 2021, the Mahajot won 35 of the 46 assembly constituencies in these districts, while the BJP-led NDA secured 11.Overall, the Mahajot won 50 seats in the 126-member assembly—in other words, 70% of its wins came from just these 11 districts.With the Muslim community comprising 34% of Assam’s population of over 3 crore, Assam has the highest proportion of Muslim residents among all states, second only to the Muslim-majority Union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir.Himanta Biswa Sarma is no ordinary former Congressman, nor is he just another politician who left the Congress for the BJP and found success there. Once a minister in the Assam government led by Tarun Gogoi, Sarma has aggressively targeted his former party since joining the BJP.However, in recent days, the Congress, too, has attacked Sarma, including releasing a “corruption chargesheet” against him and his government.Also, while he has mostly attacked Rahul Gandhi, Sarma has recently been butting heads with Gaurav Gogoi over the Congress leader’s alleged Pakistan links.By picking the younger Gogoi as its face, the Congress has signalled its intent to take Sarma head-on.In a 2021 post-poll survey by Lokniti with nearly 3,500 respondents, Gogoi came second but led Sarma, with 428 people favouring him as the next chief minister compared to 370 for Sarma, who was third. That poll was led by then-CM Sarbananda Sonowal , who led the BJP’s first government in Assam. Sonowal was moved to the Centre, where he remains a minister, with Sarma succeeding him in Dispur.When the Congress announced its first list of candidates—Gogoi and 41 others— the election schedule was yet to be released. By taking the lead, the Congress is clearly seeking a first-mover advantage. Sending him to contest the poll battle also underlines the party’s strategy of putting forward a high-profile leader to boost its prospects in the state.However, with the BJP well entrenched, a Congress victory is far from straightforward. With ample resources at its disposal, and banking on the popularity of Prime Minister Narendra Modi and CM Sarma, the saffron party has positioned itself to score a hat trick in Assam.The election battle is fast approaching. The voting will be held in a single phase on April 9. The counting of votes will take place on May 4.
Article Summary: Congress has made a major move to boost its prospects in Assam as it attempts to return to power in the state after a decade. The party has fielded its state unit chief, Gaurav Gogoi, to contest his first state election from the assembly constituency of the same name. Since the demise of his father in 2020, the 43-year-old has emerged as the Congress’ most prominent face.

Article Title: Assembly Election Dates 2026 Schedule: Voting date, result and full details for West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Assam, Kerala & Puducherry
Article Text:
Assembly elections



Election Commission Explains Why West Bengal And Tamil Nadu Faced SIR, But Not Assam

West Bengal

Poll Will the anti-incumbency factor play a significant role in Kerala's elections? Definitely Not likely

Tamil Nadu

Assam

Kerala

Puducherry

The Election Commission on Sunday announced the assembly poll schedule for four states — West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Assam, Kerala — and the Union Territory of Puducherry.The elections will be held between April 9 and April 29. The results for all five legislative assemblies will be declared on May 4.These polls are mandated as the legislative terms end between May and June 2026: West Bengal (May 7), Tamil Nadu (May 10), Assam (May 20), Kerala (May 23), and Puducherry (June 15).Elections in West Bengal will be held in two phases: first phase will be conducted on April 23 and the second one on April 29.As West Bengal gears up for its 294-seat assembly polls in 2026, chief minister Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress (TMC) remains the frontrunner, leveraging its 2021 sweep of 213 seats through flagship welfare like Lakshmir Bhandar for women and rural job schemes.The BJP-led NDA, under Suvendu Adhikari, eyes a comeback by targeting 200+ seats in Hindu-majority North Bengal and Junglemahal, vowing NRC implementation, and anti-corruption.A revived Left-Congress alliance fights for relevance.Controversy swirls around Special Intensive Revision (SIR), with BJP asserting that lakhs of fake voters (Rohingyas, infiltrators) in Muslim areas have been finally removed, but the TMC labeling it as minority harassment.Elections in Tamil Nadu will be held in a single phase on April 23.Tamil Nadu's 234-seat assembly elections pit the ruling Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) under chief minister M.K. Stalin against the opposition All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (AIADMK) and a resurgent BJP alliance.Key battles revolve around welfare populism, law and order, and Dravidian identity versus national integration narratives.Stalin's government highlights industrial growth and social justice, while opponents criticise corruption and power cuts.Elections in Assam will be held in a single phase on April 9.Assam's 126 seats pit chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma's BJP-led coalition against the Congress-led opposition, focusing on indigenous rights, flood management, and anti-infiltration drives.BJP highlights development and citizenship reforms like NRC, while critics point to unemployment and rhino poaching. Sarma's popularity could secure a second term, though regional parties like AGP play kingmakerElections in Kerala will be held in a single phase on April 9.Kerala, with 140 assembly seats, heads to polls in 2026 amid a two-way contest between the ruling Left Democratic Front (LDF) led by chief minister Pinarayi Vijayan's CPI(M) and the opposition United Democratic Front (UDF) under Congress.The LDF seeks a third term, leveraging welfare schemes and development, but faces anti-incumbency over issues like unemployment and high living costs.The BJP aims to expand its foothold among Hindu voters, though it remains a marginal player in the state's polarized politics.Elections in Puducherry will be held in a single phase on April 9.The 30-seat UT race sees N Rangasamy's AINRC-BJP NDA (20 seats in 2021) face Congress-DMK push (10 seats targeted), stressing Centre aid versus local gripes like liquor bans and outages. Rangasamy's sway and BJP youth drive will decide the verdict here.
Article Summary: The Election Commission on Sunday announced the assembly poll schedule for four states. The elections will be held between April 9 and April 29. The results for all five legislative assemblies will be declared on May 4. These polls are mandated as the legislative terms end between May and June 2026.

Article Title: Mysuru’s 1st cybercafe downs shutters after nearly 30 years
Article Text: MYSURU: Cyber Cruise, one of Mysuru’s earliest internet browsing centres in Cheluvamba Agrahara, shut down on Monday, marking the end of an era in the city’s internet journey.Started in 1997 with just two computers and an internet speed of 32 kbps, the centre initially charged Rs 120 per hour. Before the Covid-19 pandemic struck, the cafe grew to 20 terminals with eight staff members, bringing hourly browsing charges down to just Rs 10.However, a steep decline in footfall after the pandemic forced the centre to close down. For many in Mysuru, Cyber Cruise was more than just a place to browse. It was where first emails were composed and distant family members stayed connected.As its shutters come down, it leaves behind memories of a slower, but curious digital age when the internet itself was seen as a wonder.According to owner MA Mohan, the cafe once had a daily footfall of around 200 visitors, but that number has now dwindled to just five or six a day.“Covid-19 killed the industry,” he said. “I had applied to upgrade the centre to a Karnataka One outlet. As my application was not accepted, I decided to stop operations,” he said. Mohan recalled that the concept of cybercafes was new to Mysuru in the late 1990s.“I had read about cybercafes booming in the US and Europe. Inspired by the ‘Internet Cruise’ cafe concept, I named my centre Cyber Cruise,” he said.He started the cafe with a loan of Rs 2 lakh.“My first customers were two foreigners, staying at a nearby lodge, who had come to learn yoga at Lakshmipuram,” Mohan recalled. Over time, the cafe became popular among locals. “Those days, sending a single email could take nearly an hour,” Mohan recalled.
Article Summary: Cyber Cruise was one of Mysuru’s earliest internet browsing centres in Cheluvamba Agrahara. Started in 1997 with just two computers and an internet speed of 32 kbps, the centre initially charged Rs 120 per hour. Before the Covid-19 pandemic struck, the cafe grew to 20 terminals.

Article Title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: RR's 'freak' who only understands batting
Article Text:
RR's Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (PTI Photo/Manvender Vashist Lav)

Watch Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag watches West Ham vs Man City in London Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag watches West Ham vs Man City in London

Poll Which young player do you believe has the most potential to succeed? Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Yashasvi Jaiswal

Chennai: Rajasthan Royals have banked on young talent for success — Vaibhav Sooryavanshi being at the top of the list. And one of the backroom boys who has helped the franchise shape its youth structure is performance coach Siddhartha Lahiri, who oversees the RR academies across the globe as well.Reflecting on Sooryavanshi’s rapid rise, Lahiri told TOI: “He’s got immense calibre for sure, he’s a freak, a 14-year-old with that level of potential. He’s in that phase of his life where he loves to breathe cricket and he loves to bat. From a cricketing perspective, we can only hope he goes on to do things that feel unreal to watch.”The coach emphasised that the franchise aims to nurture not just players but quality coaches as well. Their academies have already produced international names such as Ollie Pope, Shoaib Bashir and Phil Salt, while closer to home, the focus remains on developing talents like Yashasvi Jaiswal Riyan Parag and Dhruv Jurel.The departure of Sanju Samson was a blow to the Royals, and Lahiri admitted the team would feel his absence. “He is one of the best white-ball cricketers and a player of immense calibre. Of course, he’ll be missed. I’ve been privileged to see him play some amazing innings for us... People are talking about his World Cup success in the last three games, but we in Royals were used to it. It was a mutual decision to part ways, and I wish him every success.”Backing Parag’s leadership credentials, despite a mixed season last year, Lahiri expressed strong confidence in the youngster. “He is outstanding. He has led his domestic side; he plays his cricket in Assam, which means he knows what it means to be an underdog. He is extremely well-respected within the Royals and shares a great rapport with head coach Kumar Sangakkara and the team. I believe Parag has the quality to become an astute leader,” he said.Lahiri also noted that Parag’s progress in the white-ball format has been significant. “If not for a minor shoulder injury, he could well have been part of the T20 World Cup squad. He is an unbelievable white-ball player, and with the fearless brand of cricket India is playing, he fits right in,” he added.
Article Summary: Rajasthan Royals have banked on young talent for success. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is at the top of the list. Performance coach Siddhartha Lahiri has helped the franchise shape its youth structure. Poll Which young player do you believe has the most potential to succeed?

Article Title: Pakistan's Akhtar revives Mohammad Amir fixing memory with huge no-ball
Article Text:
Photo/social media

Watch IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain

Pakistan fast bowler Asad Akhtar drew attention after delivering a big no-ball during a National T20 Cup match on Saturday, March 14.Playing for Karachi Blues against Lahore Blues at the Imran Khan Cricket Stadium in Peshawar, the right-arm pacer gave away 21 runs in his only over. He bowled two wides and two no-balls, with one delivery drawing particular attention as his front foot was well beyond the crease, while his back foot appeared closer to the line.The delivery was compared by fans to Mohammad Amir’s no-ball against England during the 2010 spot-fixing case at Lord’s, with Akhtar’s no-ball appearing big in comparison.Akhtar is new at the top level, having made his debut earlier this year.In five T20 matches, he has taken three wickets at an economy rate of 9.14. In the ongoing tournament, he has picked up one wicket in two matches while conceding runs at an economy rate of 11.25.Despite his over, Karachi Blues secured a 57-run win. Jahandad Khan and Shahnawaz Dahani took four wickets each as Lahore Blues were bowled out for 149 in 17.3 overs while chasing 206.Earlier, Karachi Blues scored 206 for three after being asked to bat first. Saad Baig led the innings with an unbeaten 72 off 37 balls, hitting seven fours and four sixes. He was supported by Ahsan Ali (39), Shah Raza Naqvi (30) and Usman Rahim (33).The win moved Karachi Blues to fourth place in Group B with four points and a net run rate of -0.126.
Article Summary: Pakistan fast bowler Asad Akhtar drew attention after delivering a big no-ball during a National T20 Cup match on Saturday, March 14. The right-arm pacer gave away 21 runs in his only over. Despite his over, Karachi Blues secured a 57-run win.

Article Title: Candace Owens Podcast: “You’re girl-mathing it”: Candace Owens draws criticism over women remark as Erika Kirk series pause impacts YouTube podcast numbers
Article Text:
Candace Owens draws criticism over women remark as Erika Kirk series pause impacts YouTube podcast numbers (Image via Getty)

Watch LEAKED Call? Candace Owens Says TPUSA Held Secret Zoom After Charlie Kirk Died LEAKED Call? Candace Owens Says TPUSA Held Secret Zoom After Charlie Kirk Died

Candace Owens explains podcast numbers as Erika Kirk series preparation leads to break in episodes





Candace Owens is in the news again after she said her podcast is the number one podcast in the world. She shared the update on X, writing, “Pleased to announce we are the #1 Podcast globally again! (tied w/ Joe Rogan but he doesn’t count, he’s always crushing it). Thank you to everyone worldwide who listens and fights with us. My team of 5 works really hard and we are beyond grateful.” But soon after her post, people online started questioning the claim. One user replied, “Sorry @RealCandaceO but even on these charts, you’re not Number 1. You manipulated what we are looking at to pretend you are.” The same concern was repeated by another user as well.Candace Owens responded directly. She wrote,“You are girl-mathing it. Viewership decreased because we took 10 days off air to prepare for our Erika Kirk series.Find the nearest male to explain to you things like total volume output vs episode average, etc and how these things are calculated. Men can help.”Her reply quickly spread across the platform, bringing more attention to both her podcast ranking claim and her upcoming content.In her response, Candace Owens made it clear that her show’s numbers dropped for a short time because her team paused new episodes for 10 days.She said this break was planned so they could prepare for a new series focused on Erika Kirk.While she did not share full details about the Erika Kirk series in that exchange, her message shows that the project is a major focus right now. The pause in content, according to her, affected average episode numbers but not the overall reach of the podcast.The discussion online mostly centers on how podcast rankings are measured. Some charts look at total listens over time, while others focus on average views per episode. Candace Owens pointed to this difference in her reply, saying people were not reading the data correctly.This is not the first time Candace Owens has been part of online debates. She often trends on X for her strong opinions and direct replies to critics. Her podcast has also seen steady growth over time, especially among her core audience.At the same time, her content choices, including special series like the upcoming Erika Kirk project, often shape how her numbers move week to week.
Article Summary: Candace Owens is in the news again after she said her podcast is the number one podcast in the world. She shared the update on X, writing, “Pleased to announce we are the #1 Podcast globally again! (tied w/ Joe Rogan but he doesn’t count, he’s always crushing it). Thank you to everyone worldwide who listens and fights with us.” Soon after her post, people online started questioning the claim.

Article Title: Rachel Stuhlmann Grabs Attention With St Patrick’s Day Post as Tennis Influencer Sparks Huge Fan Reaction Online
Article Text:
Rachel Stuhlmann (Image Via Getty)

Rachel Stuhlmann St Patrick’s Day post goes viral as tennis influencer builds strong social media presence

Rachel Stuhlmann is once again getting attention online, and this time it is because of her St Patrick’s Day look. The tennis influencer shared a simple post, but it quickly grabbed people’s interest. Wearing a fitted green dress, she marked the occasion with style and confidence. Her post on X carried just one line, “Happy St. Patrick’s Day!”, but that was enough to get fans talking.Within minutes, reactions started pouring in. People were quick to notice her outfit and overall look. Many fans praised her appearance and flooded the comment section with positive messages. Her audience connection showed its strength through her simple social media post.The evidence showed that she maintained her public presence through activities which extended beyond her tennis career.Rachel Stuhlmann has built a strong identity as a tennis personality who blends sport with lifestyle content. This latest post is just another example of how she keeps her followers engaged. Her green dress stood out, with a clean and simple design that matched the St Patrick’s Day theme. The look was not overdone, but it still caught attention.Fans were quick to react in the comments. One user wrote, “You look amazing.” Another said, “Whoa! Great day to be Irish.” A third added, “That’s a spectacular dress… hope you enjoy the day.” One more comment read, “Happy St Patrick’s Day gorgeous.” These reactions show how her posts often create quick engagement and strong responses.Rachel is not just known for her social media presence. She has a background in tennis as well. She played at the college level in the NCAA and reached a ranking of No. 77 during her playing days. Over time, she moved into coaching and even worked with Varvara Lepchenko during the Australian Open last year. This gives her content more depth, as she understands the sport from inside.Now, she describes herself as a tennis and pickleball content creator. Her online following continues to grow steadily. She has more than 302000 Instagram followers and about 137000 followers on X. Her participation in major tennis tournaments, which includes Grand Slams, maintains her connection to the sport.Her ability to combine tennis with her personal style and lifestyle content creates her distinctiveness. He shares his event and training and daily life activities which allow fans to establish a deeper connection with him. This balance has helped her build a strong and loyal audience over time.Rachel Stuhlmann demonstrates her ability to maintain contemporary relevance through her social media content. She uses tennis and social media to establish direct and uncomplicated connections with her audience.
Article Summary: Rachel Stuhlmann has built a strong identity as a tennis personality who blends sport with lifestyle content. Her ability to combine tennis with her personal style and lifestyle content creates her distinctiveness. Her participation in major tennis tournaments, which includes Grand Slams, maintains her connection to the sport.

Article Title: Miami Open Withdrawal: “He needs a few more matches”: Novak Djokovic Raises Fitness Questions After Miami Open Exit as Martina Navratilova Points to Lack of Match Practice
Article Text:
Novak Djokovic and Martina Navratilova (Image Via Getty)

Martina Navratilova says Novak Djokovic needs more matches after Miami Open withdrawal raises fitness concerns

Novak Djokovic has pulled out of the 2026 Miami Open just days before the tournament, and it has raised fresh questions about his form and fitness. The 38-year-old Serbian star cited a shoulder issue, but the timing of the decision has caught attention, especially with the clay season coming up next.What made this bigger was Martina Navratilova’s reaction. The former World No. 1 did not question his talent, but she did point out something important. In her view, Djokovic is not playing enough matches right now, and that could affect him when the biggest tournaments arrive.Martina Navratilova shared her thoughts openly while speaking about Novak Djokovic’s withdrawal. She made it clear that staying match-ready is just as important as staying fit.“We haven’t noticed anything wrong with his shoulder here, but the balls and everything else are heavier in Miami, so who knows? Hopefully, he’ll be fine and we’ll see him back soon,” she said.She then added a more direct point about his schedule. “I think he needs to play more matches before the big tournaments. I think he’s been so withdrawn that, even though he’s as solid as he is, I feel he needs a few more matches to be at his best.”Djokovic has been selective with his schedule this year. So far, he has played nine matches and won seven of them. He began his season at the Australian Open and looked sharp early on, reaching the fourth round without dropping a set.From there, things became a bit unusual. He moved into the quarterfinals after Jakub Mensik pulled out due to injury. In the next match, he was struggling against Lorenzo Musetti and was two sets down. But the match turned when Musetti retired injured in the third set, sending Djokovic into the semifinals.He then faced Jannik Sinner and managed to beat him, marking his first win over Sinner since 2023. That result gave fans hope, but in the final, he lost to Carlos Alcaraz.After that run, Djokovic played at Indian Wells. He won against Kamil Majchrzak and Aleksandar Kovacevic to reach the fourth round. However, he was stopped by Jack Draper in a close Round of 16 match.His Miami Open withdrawal now adds more uncertainty. Along with him, players like Emma Raducanu, Emma Navarro, and Barbora Krejcikova have also pulled out of the event. Jacob Fearnley has taken Djokovic’s place in the draw.Looking ahead, Djokovic is expected to return at the Monte Carlo Masters, a tournament he has won twice before. For now, the focus remains on his fitness and whether he can build enough match rhythm before the next Grand Slam.
Article Summary: Novak Djokovic has pulled out of the 2026 Miami Open. The Serbian star cited a shoulder issue, but the timing of the decision has caught attention, especially with the clay season coming up next. Martina Navratilova says he needs more matches to be at his best.

Article Title: Nhl Updates: Trevor Zegras returns with Philadelphia Flyers to face Anaheim Ducks in key NHL match
Article Text:
Philadelphia Flyers' Alex Bump, center, returns to the bench after scoring during the second period of an NHL hockey game against the Pittsburgh Penguins in Pittsburgh, Saturday, March 7, 2026. (AP Photo/Gene J. Puskar)

Watch 3/17 Practice Trevor Zegras 3/17 Practice Trevor Zegras

Trevor Zegras leads Philadelphia Flyers against Anaheim Ducks in NHL game

The focus is placed squarely on Trevor Zegras because he is about to make a long-awaited visit to Anaheim, but in Philadelphia colors. Almost one year after his change of team left the Ducks, the young forward has found his rhythm and regularity, becoming one of the players who bring the Flyers into the current NHL season.The process of the trade that Zegras has undergone has been resilience and adaptation. Having experienced some unpredictability in the early years, the native of Bedford, New York, has steadily grown by exhibiting some signs of maturity in terms of his offensive game and his general decision-making. His capability to adjust to various roles has enhanced the lineup of Philadelphia, and he is a useful tool in today's NHL match.Trevor Zegras should be one of the central figures in this preview of the NHL match where the Philadelphia Flyers will play against the Anaheim Ducks. After getting a chance to go back to his natural centre midfielder role, Zegras has performed better in the recent past with a greater contribution in the playmaking and puck control aspects of the game.Until now, he has been mostly functioning as a winger, but the change of position to center has provided an extra layer to his performance in the past few games.The contest involves an emotional dimension, considering the fact that he is playing against his former team. But Zegras has had his cool attitude and has concentrated on expansion without thinking of the situation in the past.On the one hand, Zegras returns to Anaheim Ducks with mixed feelings. Although fans still recall his shocking ability and talent, they are ready to watch him as an opponent. This dynamic creates excitement for the contest, and as one of the more discussed NHL updates of recent days.With both teams getting ready to hit the puck, the question is how successful Trevor Zegras can be in making a difference in the game. His output may be a game-changer, whether it is staying in the middle or moving positions in the middle of the game. This game is another significant moment in his developing NHL career, with his confidence and something to prove.
Article Summary: Trevor Zegras returns to Anaheim Ducks with mixed feelings. The young forward has found his rhythm and regularity. The contest involves an emotional dimension, considering the fact that he is playing against his former team. This game is another significant moment in his developing NHL career, with his confidence and something to prove.

Article Title: Sports Illustrated Swimsuit 2026: Rob Gronkowski and Camille Kostek Relationship Timeline: The TE Slipped Her His Number at a Charity Event in 2013, and Here Is Everything That Happened in the 12 Year
Article Text:
Camille Kostek revealed her Sports Illustrated Swimsuit 2026 return this week. The update also put fresh attention on her years-long relationship with Rob Gronkowski. (Image via Getty)

Camille Kostek has been shooting Sports Illustrated Swimsuit since 2018 and is now heading to Botswana for her ninth year

Rob Gronkowski and Camille Kostek's relationship timeline: from a sneaky phone number to Super Bowl confetti and still no ring



November 2013: They meet at a Patriots Thanksgiving charity event



September 2015: They go public after two years of keeping it quiet



July 2016: Their first official red carpet at Nickelodeon's Kids' Choice Sports Awards



May 2019: Kostek lands her first SI Swimsuit cover, Gronkowski plays personal bodyguard



February 7, 2021: Kostek watches Gronkowski win Super Bowl LV in a rhinestone jacket with his name and number



January 2023: Gronkowski confirms engagement talk but blames busy schedules



February 2025: Kostek describes their life as "so busy" but says it's fun



On Tuesday, Camille Kostek posted on her Instagram story confirming she is back for her ninth Sports Illustrated Swimsuit shoot, this time in Botswana. "I've been keeping a secret!! I'm back for my 9th year shooting for Sports Illustrated Swimsuit 2026 in Botswana," she wrote. She followed it with shots from the location: one posing by a truck in a leopard-print top and another sun-drenched, captioned "So happy to be back."Kostek first shot for SI in 2018 and landed her first cover in 2019. Nine years in, she is still showing up. Meanwhile, her relationship with retired NFL star Rob Gronkowski has quietly crossed the decade mark, and fans have been waiting on one thing the whole time.The 2026 shoot marks a milestone. Kostek posted both a teaser and a full swimsuit reveal on Instagram, confirming the Botswana location.In late February, Gronkowski also celebrated her 34th birthday on Instagram with the caption "Happy Birthday my Love," posting a selfie, a picture together, and a shot of Kostek on a yacht.Gronkowski and Kostek were filling turkey baskets for families in need through a Goodwill Boston event. His teammate slipped her his number, written on the back of a name sticker. She kept it to herself. "I didn't make it locker room talk.I never spoke about it," she recalled on SiriusXM's This Is Happening. A few days later, she FaceTimed him.Kostek was spotted cheering for Gronkowski from the stands. That same month, she posted a photo with him captioned "Friday night date night", his first appearance on her Instagram.At the launch party in Miami, Gronkowski stood watch at the entrance of her VIP section, got behind the DJ booth, and did squats with Kostek on his back.She posted them kissing in the confetti with the caption "Tastes like a champion."In an interview with PEOPLE, he said they "definitely talk about" getting engaged, then added: "Maybe some magic will happen. ... [It's] going to have to eventually happen." It didn't, at least not publicly.Ahead of Super Bowl LIX, she told Fox News Digital: "He's stepped into this next chapter of his life, but he's so busy with FOX." She added: "We're always finding something to challenge us." Nine years together. Four Super Bowls. Nine SI shoots. Still no ring announced. Gronkowski has a lot to keep up with.
Article Summary: Camille Kostek is heading to Botswana for her ninth Sports Illustrated Swimsuit shoot. The update also put fresh attention on her years-long relationship with Rob Gronkowski. She first shot for SI in 2018 and landed her first cover in 2019. The 2026 shoot marks a milestone.

travel to Boston onfor a cross-conference game that matters for both teams in the standings. Article Title: Taylor Swift Teu Performance: "No one bullies Taylor Swift!": George Kittle spills the tea on her surprise TEU set
Article Text:
(Getty)

Bussin’ With The Boys

Taylor Swift didn’t plan TEU performance—George Kittle says moms made it happen



"The only reason she performed is because my mom, Jan, and my wife Claire’s mom were basically like, ‘You should totally sing,’"

"They kind of bullied her into doing it!"

"I’m kidding, obviously! No one bullies Taylor Swift. She was just being incredibly sweet and went with the flow. But my mom definitely didn't take 'no' for an answer at first!"

When you’re an All-Pro NFL tight end like George Kittle, you’re used to being the biggest, toughest guy in the room. But as it turns out, even the stars of the San Francisco 49ers have to answer to a higher power: their moms.During a hilarious appearance on thepodcast this week (March 17, 2026), Kittle finally dropped the "behind-the-scenes" truth about one of the most viral moments of last summer, Taylor Swift’s surprise acoustic performance at Tight End University (TEU) in Nashville.We all remember the grainy fan footage from June 2025: Taylor standing on the stage at the Brooklyn Bowl, guitar in hand, playing "Shake It Off" for a room full of sweaty, 250-pound football players.At the time, everyone thought Travis Kelce had pulled some romantic strings to get his then-girlfriend (now fiancée!) to perform.Not quite. According to Kittle, the credit goes to a very specific "marketing team."Kittle joked during the podcast. He laughed as he described the moms essentially cornering the world’s biggest pop star.Kittle was quick to realize that using the word "bullied" in the same sentence as Taylor Swift is a dangerous game. He immediately flashed that signature Kittle grin and walked it back before the internet could erupt.Kittle went on to say that despite playing in front of 70,000 screaming fans every Sunday, the energy in that small Nashville bowling alley was unlike anything he’d ever felt. He credited Taylor not only for the performance but for helping recruit country superstar Luke Combs to join the set, making it the most legendary TEU after-party in history.With Taylor and Travis officially engaged as of late 2025, the bond between the Kelces and the Kittles seems stronger than ever. Fans are already wondering if Jan Kittle will be in charge of the wedding music, too!One thing is for sure: if George Kittle’s mom tells you to get on stage and sing, you’d better start warming up your vocal cords.
Article Summary: The San Francisco 49ers tight end revealed the truth about Taylor Swift's TEU performance. He said his mom, Jan, and his wife Claire's mom "bullied" her into doing it. Taylor also helped recruit country singer Luke Combs to join the set.

Article Title: Anthony Joshua News: Anthony Joshua Back in Camp With Oleksandr Usyk Team as Recovery Timeline Raises Fresh Doubts Over Tyson Fury Fight
Article Text:
Anthony Joshua and Tyson Fury (Image Via Getty)

Anthony Joshua links with Oleksandr Usyk team again as Eddie Hearn shares comeback timeline after injury recovery

Anthony Joshua is slowly finding his way back to boxing, and this time it feels different. After months of recovery following a serious car crash, the former heavyweight champion has now stepped back into a proper training camp. What makes it more interesting is that he is working again with Oleksandr Usyk’s team, a familiar setup from the past.This update comes at a time when fans are still unsure about his exact return date. Joshua has been taking things step by step, focusing first on healing his body and dealing with personal loss. Now, with training intensity increasing, there is finally a clearer direction about what could come next in his career.Anthony Joshua has not rushed this comeback. After the accident, he spent time doing light training at Finchley Amateur Boxing Club, the same place where his journey began. Alongside that, he continued physical therapy to rebuild strength.Now, he has moved into a more serious training phase. He has linked up again with trainer Iegor Golub, who worked with him in his last fight against Jake Paul. Golub has long been part of Oleksandr Usyk’s team, and that connection is now playing a key role in Joshua’s return.Joshua’s promoter Eddie Hearn also gave a clear update while speaking on The Stomping Ground. He addressed the ongoing talk around a possible Tyson Fury fight and made it clear nothing is confirmed yet.“There is absolutely nothing signed with Anthony Joshua to fight Tyson Fury next. There is nothing agreed,” Hearn said.He also explained how plans changed after the accident. “There has been conversations and deep conversations as well prior to obviously the accident that he was going to fight Jake Paul, then he was going to fight in February or March in Saudi Arabia, then he was going to fight Tyson Fury.”Right now, the focus is only on Joshua’s recovery and readiness. Hearn added, “We are more than up for that fight, but AJ needs to go back into camp and we need to understand physically how long it will take him to return to boxing, and we are not rushing him and he isn’t rushing himself.”That careful approach means fans may have to wait a bit longer. Hearn suggested a possible return toward the end of summer if everything goes well. “But right now, there isn’t even any guarantee he returns to the ring,” he said.There is still hope for a Tyson Fury fight later. “If all goes well, I think there’s a good chance you’ll see him return July, August time, and then potentially fight Tyson Fury November, December of 2026,” Hearn explained. For now, the main focus remains simple, get Anthony Joshua fully fit, back in rhythm, and ready for whatever comes next.
Article Summary: Anthony Joshua links with Oleksandr Usyk team again as Eddie Hearn shares comeback timeline after injury recovery. Joshua is slowly finding his way back to boxing, and this time it feels different. After months of recovery following a serious car crash, the former heavyweight champion has now stepped back into a proper training camp.

Article Title: Father Abraham: Stefon Diggs trolled and named “Father Abraham” amid his breakup with Cardi B
Article Text:
(Getty Images)

Stefon Diggs trends for all the wrong reasons as “Father Abraham” memes flood social media



The internet has a unique way of turning an athlete’s personal life into a viral meme, and right now, NFL star Stefon Diggs is the undisputed MVP of the "family tree" meme cycle.If you’ve been scrolling through social media lately, you’ve likely seen the name "Father Abraham" trending alongside Diggs’ name. This nickname, a cheeky reference to the nursery rhyme about a man with many sons, has taken over X and TikTok. The digital consensus is clear: fans are labeling Diggs the new "captain" of prolific fatherhood, with users joking that he is single-handedly trying to staff his own football team.The "Father Abraham" label has gained aggressive traction in March because Diggs is currently navigating a messy, high-profile breakup with Cardi B . The pair, who were once the NFL's "it-couple," reportedly split following the New England Patriots' Super Bowl loss in February.The breakup has been anything but quiet. Sources suggest Cardi was "deeply disappointed" by a string of cheating allegations and the sudden emergence of multiple paternity suits that surfaced while she was pregnant. The drama reached a boiling point when the two unfollowed each other on Instagram, and Cardi was recently spotted moving on with Moroccan footballer Achraf Hakimi, leaving fans to troll Diggs for "losing the Super Bowl and the girl" in the same week.The fuel for the "Father Abraham" fire is the sheer volume of children linked to Diggs in a very short window. On November 4, 2025, he and Cardi B welcomed a baby boy, nicknamed "Touchdown" or "Baby Brim" by the couple. However, that joy was quickly overshadowed by a "busy year" of legal filings:Aileen Lopera (Lord Gisselle): Just months before Cardi gave birth, a DNA test confirmed Diggs as the father of her daughter, Charliee Harper (born April 2025).K’yanna Barber: The model also recently linked a son named Colmy to the star.he "Seven" Rumor: While the internet claims he has seven "baby mamas," only about four children are currently verified or publicly acknowledged, including his eldest daughter, Nova.Between a collapsing high-profile romance and a flurry of paternity headlines, the internet isn't letting Diggs off the hook. For now, the name is sticking as fans watch his off-field "stats" generate just as much conversation as his yards-per-catch.
Article Summary: Stefon Diggs' name is trending as "Father Abraham" on social media. The nickname is a reference to the nursery rhyme about a man with many sons. Diggs is currently navigating a messy, high-profile breakup with Cardi B.

Article Title: World Baseball Classic: Bryce Harper Responds After Team USA Falls to Venezuela as World Baseball Classic Loss Raises Bigger Team Questions
Article Text:
Bryce Harper (Image Via Getty)

Bryce Harper and Aaron Judge react as Team USA falls to Venezuela in World Baseball Classic final

Team USA came very close but could not finish the job in the 2026 World Baseball Classic final. They lost 3-2 to Venezuela at LoanDepot Park in Miami on Tuesday. It was a tight game till the end, but one late moment changed everything and gave Venezuela their first title.Even after the loss, Bryce Harper did not show frustration. Instead, he chose to speak with respect. While fans were still processing the result, Harper made it clear that he had full appreciation for how Venezuela played on the big stage.Bryce Harper had a big role in keeping Team USA alive in the game. In the eighth inning, he hit a two-run home run that tied the score and gave the team hope. For a moment, it felt like the momentum had shifted.But the game slipped away in the ninth inning. Venezuela’s Eugenio Suárez hit an RBI double that made the difference and sealed the win.After the game, Harper spoke openly about the result. His message, shared by USA Today’s Bob Nightengale on X, focused more on respect than disappointment.“I want to win gold, just like anybody else,” Harper said. “But at the end of the night, man, they did it. They won. I mean, all, you know, all the congratulations to them and what they did, and they fought hard, they played a great game.I mean, I got nobody, nothing but respect for them.”While Harper delivered when it mattered, Aaron Judge had a tough outing. The Team USA captain went 0 for 4 and struck out three times. It was not the performance he would have wanted in such a big game.Still, Judge did not shy away from the moment after the loss. He spoke honestly about the expectations and the result.“Getting a chance to be the captain of Team USA, my job was to go out there and bring a championship, bring the gold home,” Judge said. “We didn’t do that, but there’s no pressure. When you got a team like this, just go out there and do your job. That’s what I try to do every single night. And we gave ourselves a shot, but we just couldn’t close it out.”Manager Mark DeRosa also shared a similar feeling. He admitted the team did not perform well enough overall and said the offense had been an issue during the tournament.This loss marks another tough finish for Team USA in the World Baseball Classic. But even in defeat, players like Bryce Harper showed the kind of respect that defines the game.
Article Summary: Team USA lost 3-2 to Venezuela in the 2026 World Baseball Classic final. Bryce Harper had a big role in keeping Team USA alive in the game. He hit a two-run home run that gave the team hope in the eighth inning. But the game slipped away in the ninth inning.

Article Title: Emma Raducanu: Grand Slam Champion Emma Raducanu: From Relationships To Top Endorsements – Everything About Her Life Off The Tennis Court
Article Text:
All about Emma Raducanu's net worth, brand deals and personal life.Image: Getty

Dating rumours to top endorsements: Emma Raducanu's life off court



Emma Raducanu is in the news again, and unfortunately it is not for a title. The British No. 1 has withdrawn from the Miami Open 2026 due to lingering post-viral symptoms, the latest setback in a season that has had more interruptions than anyone would have wanted. The 23-year-old was seeded 24th at the tournament and had received a first-round bye, but the illness she picked up back in February during the Transylvania Open in Romania has simply refused to clear. She pulled out on Monday, and her ranking has since slipped from 23rd to 26th on the WTA Tour.On the commercial side, Enna Raducanu made a big move by signing with Uniqlo as a brand ambassador, becoming the first female tennis player to be sponsored by the Japanese brand.She left Nike, her apparel partner since the age of 15, in a deal reported to be worth upwards of $3 million annually. The partnership puts her alongside Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic in the Uniqlo family.Emma Raducanu has been linked to a handful of high-profile names over the years, though she has always kept the details close. Her most public relationship was with Carlo Agostinelli, the son of billionaire financier Robert Agostinelli, which came to light during Paris Fashion Week in September 2023 when the two were photographed together at a Dior show.They split in 2024.In 2025, she was linked to Carlos Alcaraz after the two paired up for mixed doubles at the US Open. Both shut it down clearly. "We're just good friends," she told reporters at Wimbledon . As of early 2026, Raducanu seems to be single and has been unbothered about all the speculation. She told The Guardian, "I know, I guess it comes with the territory, people being so curious. I just keep myself to myself."Born in Toronto to a Romanian father and Chinese mother, she moved to London at the age of two. Her parents were strict about focus and discipline, and she has said openly that boyfriends were simply not allowed when she was younger. "My parents were very much against it as it interfered with training," she told The Times. "A lot of the time I was very resentful. But it made me very confident and comfortable in my own company, which is also a big strength. "Outside tennis, Raducanu is known for her love of Formula 1, her support of Tottenham Hotspur and the fact that she speaks three languages fluently: English, Mandarin, and Romanian. She was awarded an MBE by King Charles III in 2021 following her US Open win. At 23, with most of her career still ahead of her, the numbers and the story are only going to get bigger.
Article Summary: British No. 1 Emma Raducanu pulls out of Miami Open 2026 due to illness. The 23-year-old was seeded 24th at the tournament and had received a first-round bye. She has been linked to a handful of high-profile names over the years, though she has kept the details close.

Article Title: Sidney Crosby: Penguins’ Sidney Crosby Set to Face Carolina Hurricanes for the First Time Since His Olympic Injury
Article Text:
Sidney Crosby set to return against Hurricanes since his Olympic return (Image via Getty Images)

Penguins’ Sidney Crosby set to make his first appearance since Olympic injury

After a long wait and putting an end to all speculation, Pittsburgh Penguins’ Sidney Crosby is set to face the Carolina Hurricanes for the first time since his Olympic injury. This was announced by the Penguins management on Wednesday that he will be seen against the Hurricanes at the Lenovo Center.The Pittsburgh Penguins are continuing with the NHL playoff race, despite having played three weeks without Crosby. However, their wait seems to be over as the player will take over tonight against the Hurricanes.According to earlier reports, Crosby has been sidelined from the team since suffering a Grade 2 MCL sprain in his right knee while playing for Team Canada at the 2026 Winter Olympics, an injury later revealed by teammate Mitch Marner after weeks of organizational silence.Since sustaining a lower-body injury in the 2026 Winter Olympics quarterfinal against Czechia, Crosby is making his first official appearance at the Lenovo Center.After a long hiatus from the club, Penguins’ Sidney Crosby is all set to make his first appearance since his Olympic injury. This was confirmed by the head coach of the Penguins, Dan Muse, that he will play against the Carolina Hurricanes.According to reports, while representing Team Canada, the legend suffered a lower-body injury during the 2026 Winter Olympics following a sequence with Radko Gudas.Following the incident, the Penguins later placed the 38-year-old on injured reserve and announced he would miss at least four weeks as he recovers.It is to be noted that Gudas is also currently under scrutiny due to his five-game suspension for hitting Auston Matthews this week.Announcing the same on Twitter/X account, the Penguins stated, “HE’S BAAAAAAACK! Coach Muse confirms that Sidney Crosby will play tonight versus Carolina. Crosby leads the @penguins in goals (27) and points (59) despite missing the last 11 games due to injury.”Crosby is having another strong season, scoring 27 goals and 32 assists over 56 games before Milano Cortina 2026. Meanwhile, the Penguins are currently second in the Metro Division, but with no room to breathe. They are tied in points with the New York Islanders (81 each), and just one point ahead of the wild card teams, the Boston Bruins and the New York Islanders.However, with Crosby’s return to the team, hopes are restored that his contribution might help the Penguins in the remaining 15 games.
Article Summary: Penguins’ Sidney Crosby set to make his first appearance since Olympic injury. Crosby has been sidelined from the team since suffering a Grade 2 MCL sprain in his right knee while playing for Team Canada at the 2026 Winter Olympics. Pittsburgh Penguins are continuing with the NHL playoff race, despite having played three weeks without Crosby.

Article Title: Lamar Jackson: Lamar Jackson steps into boxing world as offseason transformation goes viral
Article Text:
(Image via Getty)

Lamar Jackson Shocks Fans With Boxing Workout As He Prepares To “Knock Out” 2026 Season



"@thatsaintlife this man had me do this after combos nun stop I'm mf tired coach. I salute every boxer out there 💯"

Forget the running and the weight room, Lamar Jackson has officially entered his "Rocky Balboa" era.If you’ve seen a lean, mean, 2-time MVP throwing lightning-fast combinations on your feed this week, don’t worry, you’re not hallucinating. Lamar shocked the NFL world by posting intense training footage from a boxing gym in Miami. While he’s not trading the gridiron for the MGM Grand just yet, he has officially added high-level boxing to his 2026 offseason regimen to "knock out the competition" in his ninth season.Lamar isn't just hitting a heavy bag for a cardio burn, he’s working with some serious heavy hitters. The videos show him doing technical pad work and sparring drills with Dawson Saint Jour, a high-performance coach who has prepped elite fighters like David Benavidez.In a classic Lamar moment, he took to Instagram to admit the workout was no joke, captioning his video:He appears to be training at the gym of Coach Troy Jones, a Maryland native who has worked with hundreds of pro athletes and dozens of Super Bowl champions. The goal? To come back for the 2026 season with elite-level stamina, hand-eye coordination, and the kind of footwork that makes even the best pass rushers look like they’re stuck in quicksand.After a 2025 season that saw him battling some nagging injuries, Jackson looks noticeably "slimmed down" and more explosive in his new training clips. With a new head coach, Jesse Minter, and a freshly restructured contract that just cleared $40 million in cap space for the Ravens, the pressure is on for Lamar to finally push Baltimore over the playoff hump.The "Knockout Era" of Lamar Jackson has already sparked a wave of memes, with fans joking that Lamar is training so he can "personally address" any defender who tries to sack him this fall. Others noted that he follows in the footsteps of former Ravens QB Joe Flacco, who also took up the sport later in his career.Whether he’s dodging a left hook or a blitzing linebacker, one thing is clear: Lamar Jackson is coming for the 2026 season with hands as fast as his feet.
Article Summary: Lamar Jackson has officially entered his "Rocky Balboa" era. The 2-time MVP has added high-level boxing to his 2026 offseason regimen. The goal is to come back for the 2026 season with elite-level stamina, hand-eye coordination, and footwork.

Article Title: Marco Odermatt: Who Is Marco Odermatt’s Sister Alina? The Untold Story Behind the Ski Star’s Family
Article Text:
Marco Odermatt (Image Source: Getty)

From competitive skier to Marco Odermatt’s biggest fan

A grounded family life behind the global fame

As Marco Odermatt dominates the world ski arena, few spectators are aware of the path of his younger sister, Alina Odermatt, who at one time had the same dream. Now, she has a different, yet no less significant role as his most passionate friend.Alina did not always remain only an observer. She was also a competitive alpine skier, having entered a few FIS-level events. Among her remarkable performances was winning a bronze medal in Super-G at the Swiss Junior Championship, which reflects her potential in the sport.This notwithstanding, she left professional skiing in 2021 at the age of 20 because she could not gain entry into the elite group. She revealed the pressure of being in the same sport as one of the best in the world in the 2025 biography My World by Marco, when she admitted it was not easy to establish her own identity while living in his shadow.After retiring, Alina became a permanent fixture in her brother's profession. She is very noticeable at the finish line at major races, where she cheers with her boyfriend, Marco, and his girlfriend, Stella Parpan.The fact that she has stopped being an athlete and become a fan of her is a testament to a close family relationship, not to disappointment. Alina has been living her role to the fullest, celebrating every triumph of her brother at World Cup events and even at the Olympic stage.This has also turned out to be the sight to comfort Marco before high-pressure competitions.The Odermatt family is still well-grounded and worldly, despite Marco's international achievement. Alina is at the family house in Buochs, Switzerland, where she lives with Marco and his parents, Priska and Walti.She has frequently referred to her brother at home as nothing more than Marco, way back home, away out of the way of the international superpop icons. It is this close-knit atmosphere that has sustained the family as a humble and connected sphere, despite Marco still dominating alpine skiing.Alina is a reminder that there is another figure behind any sporting icon and hope; in this case, her sister, who knows the process better than anyone.
Article Summary: Alina Odermatt was a competitive alpine skier, having entered a few FIS-level events. She left professional skiing in 2021 at the age of 20 because she could not gain entry into the elite group. Alina has been living her role to the fullest, celebrating every triumph of her brother at World Cup events and even at the Olympic stage.

Article Title: Baiano Streamer Controversy: Who Is Baiano? Streamer Under Fire After Awkward Interview Gesture Toward Gen.G Star Chovy Sparks Debate
Article Text:
Baiano (Image Via Getty)

Baiano apologizes after popcorn gesture toward Jung Chovy Ji hoon sparks debate in League of Legends community





A moment that looked casual at first quickly turned into a big talking point in the League of Legends community. Brazilian streamer Baiano is facing backlash after his interaction with Gen.G star Jung “Chovy” Ji-hoon during the First Stand 2026 Group Stage. What seemed like a light interview after Gen.G’s win over JDG ended up creating confusion, criticism, and debate online.The problem began when Baiano conducted an interview with Chovy through his action of placing a bucket of popcorn which displayed the Gen.G logo between them on March 17 2026. The situation seemed innocent to people who lived outside Brazil. The Brazilian gaming community considers popcorn to have a precise meaning which exists within their cultural traditions.It is linked to the slang “pipoqueiro,” which is used to describe a player who struggles under pressure. Because of that, many viewers felt the gesture was disrespectful, especially in that setting.As the clip spread online, fans started reacting quickly. Many believed the moment crossed a line, especially since Chovy may not have understood the meaning behind it. The situation grew even bigger when Baiano later posted a picture with Chovy on X.Along with the image, he wrote a caption that translated to, “What a moment, family. I only have thanks for Chovy [popcorn emoji]. Thanks for the three titles handed over to Faker. ”This message added more fuel to the discussion. Some fans connected it to past results where T1, led by Faker, defeated Gen.G in major matches. The post was later deleted, but by then, it had already spread across the community.Soon after, Baiano addressed the situation. During a livestream, he explained his side and made it clear that he did not mean to disrespect Chovy. He also reached out directly to apologize.Gen.G CEO Arnold Hur confirmed this on March 18, 2026, through a post on X. He wrote, “Regarding the situation: the streamer reached out to apologize to Chovy. We were clear to him that this crossed the line which he acknowledged.”Arnold Hur also pointed out an important issue. He explained that even if the moment was meant as banter, the language and cultural gap made it unfair. Chovy could not fully understand or respond to the joke, which made the situation uncomfortable.Baiano is well known in Brazil for his League of Legends content. He has played with professional teams in the past and now runs his own team, Ilha das Lendas. His powerful community presence results in people monitoring his every action. The incident demonstrates that people perceive small actions through different cultural lenses.The way things are regarded as normal in one location creates a different public perception in another area. The international esports tournaments allow these particular occasions to develop into more extensive debates.
Article Summary: Brazilian streamer Baiano is facing backlash after his interaction with Gen.G star Jung “Chovy” Ji-hoon during the First Stand 2026 Group Stage. The Brazilian gaming community considers popcorn to have a precise meaning which exists within their cultural traditions. Many viewers felt the gesture was disrespectful, especially in that setting.

Article Title: Elena Rybakina: Andy Roddick Sends Strong Message To Elena Rybakina After Close Loss To Aryna Sabalenka In Indian Wells: "You Are As Good As Her"
Article Text:
Andy Roddick backs Elena Rybakina after Indian Wells loss.Image: Getty

Andy Roddick shares what Elena Rybakina must do after the loss



Elena Rybakina’s final loss to Aryna Sabalenka in Indian Wells final, where she came within a point of winning, has become one of the biggest talking points in tennis right now. The Kazakh star pushed Sabalenka all the way but could not close it out, with the Belarusian saving a match point to turn the match around. Across tennis news and fan reactions, the focus has shifted from the result to what Rybakina showed on court. She matched Sabalenka shot for shot, and for many, that matters more than the final score. Andy Roddick is one of those who believes this performance says a lot about where she stands.Speaking on his podcast, Andy Roddick made it clear that this loss should not shake Rybakina’s confidence. If anything, it should reinforce it.He explained it from her perspective, saying, “If you are Rybakina and you win that match you are going I closed out the year better than anyone last year, I win Australia, I lose to Sabalenka but when she has beaten me in recent history, it’s when I have won four more points at Indian Wells,” said Roddick.The message from him is simple. Rybakina is not chasing Sabalenka, she is already right alongside her. “If you are in her camp you are going you are absolutely as good as her right now.We can debate that and get into the statistics of it but if I’m her coach I’m going to say you are there. You might even be better right now. I am pitching that narrative (sic)."What stands out most to Roddick is her mindset. He believes she walks into big matches without fear, something that cannot be taught easily. “She is definitely not scared of the tough matches. She doesn’t stress test going in. She respects the best players in the world but there is no chance she does not view herself as that person right now, even with this loss to Sabalenka.”Fans seem to agree. The reaction online has been more about how close she is rather than what she missed. Now, the focus shifts quickly to the Miami Open. Rybakina comes in as the third seed and will start in the second round against either Janice Tjen or Julia Putintseva. Last year was forgettable for her in Miami, but sometimes, one point changes everything. But in this case, it might also be the moment that pushes Rybakina even further.
Article Summary: Elena Rybakina lost to Aryna Sabalenka in the Indian Wells final. Andy Roddick says the loss should not shake her confidence. He believes she is as good as Sabalenska right now. The Kazakh star will play in the second round of the Miami Open.

Article Title: NHL Player Safety Department Imposes Fine on Hurricanes Forward Seth Jarvis After Smacking Blue Jackets Player with Stick
Article Text:
Seth Jarvis of the Carolina Hurricanes celebrates after scoring a goal against the Toronto Maple Leafs (Credit: Getty Images)

Seth Jarvis fined the maximum amount for high-sticking Blue Jackets’ Conor Garland

After the Radko Gudas controversy, the NHL Player Safety Department has once again made headlines as Carolina Hurricanes forward Seth Jarvis has been fined $5,000 by the NHL's Department of Player Safety for high-sticking Columbus Blue Jackets winger Conor Garland on Tuesday night. This was announced by the NHL Department of Player Safety on Wednesday after hitting Columbus Blue Jackets forward Conor Garland.According to reports, the incident occurred early in the third period of Carolina’s game against Columbus on March 17, when Jarvis struck Garland in the face with his stick. Following the hit, Garland was seen leaving the rink due to heavy bleeding. The player then briefly exited the game for medical attention before returning, and Jarvis was assessed a double-minor penalty on the play.Earlier this week, former American hockey professional and head of the NHL's Department of Player Safety, George Perros has defended the department’s decision to imposing five-game suspension on Radko Gudas amidst the Auston Matthews controversy. Carolina Hurricanes’ Seth Jarvis was fined the maximum amount for high-sticking Blue Jackets’ Conor Garland. As per reports, the NHL’s Player Safety Department has imposed a $5,000 fine for a high-sticking incident involving Conor Garland of the Columbus Blue Jackets.The incident occurred during a third-period Tuesday night Metropolitan Division game.Announcing the same, the Player Safety Department stated, “Carolina’s Seth Jarvis has been fined $5,000, the maximum allowable under the CBA, for high-sticking Columbus’ Conor Garland.”According to reports, after battling for the puck near the Columbus blue line, Jarvis whipped around and smacked Garland in the face with his stick. The heavy impact made Garland fall right to the ice, with blood pouring out of his face.Garland required medical attention after he was hit, and he exited the rink smeared with blood all over his face. This prompted Jarvis to receive a double minor for the infraction. This is not the first time that the player has faced a fine. He was previously fined and suspended for his misconduct during a game with Blue Jackets defenseman Zach Werenski.Following the incident, the Hurricanes went on to lose the game 5-1, with Jarvis logging multiple penalty minutes. According to Daily Faceoff, in 59 games this season, Jarvis has scored 28 goals and 25 assists for 53 points, whereas Garland has just been in his sixth game with the Blue Jackets since being acquired from the Vancouver Canucks last week, having already scored four goals with his new team. Besides, the 30-year-old has 11 goals and 19 assists for 30 points in 56 games overall this year.
Article Summary: Carolina Hurricanes forward Seth Jarvis has been fined $5,000 by the NHL's Department of Player Safety for high-sticking Columbus Blue Jackets winger Conor Garland on Tuesday night. The incident occurred early in the third period of Carolina’s game against Columbus on March 17, when Jarvis struck Garland in the face with his stick. Following the hit, Garland was seen leaving the rink due to heavy bleeding.

Article Title: Travis Turner disappearance deepens as Union High School moves on with Jamie Harless hiring while charges and timing leave many questions
Article Text:
Travis Turner disappearance deepens as Union High School moves on with Jamie Harless hiring while charges and timing leave many questions (Image via Getty)

Jamie Harless steps in as Union High School moves forward after Travis Turner case and ongoing investigation

Union High School has made a big decision as the mystery around football coach Travis Turner is still not solved. Nearly four months after he went missing, the school has now named a new head coach. Jamie Harless will take over the football program while the search for Turner, 46, continues. Turner was last seen on November 20, 2025, near his home in Big Stone Gap, Virginia. His disappearance came just as authorities were preparing to question him. Soon after, serious charges were filed against him, including five counts related to illegal content involving minors and five counts of using a computer to contact a minor.As of now, there have been no confirmed sightings. According to Virginia State Police, every lead has been checked but nothing has been found. The case is still active, and officials continue to ask the public for help.With the situation still unclear, Union High decided it could not wait any longer. Principal Jerred Chandler explained that the school needed stability, especially for the students and the football team.That is where Jamie Harless comes in.Harless brings strong experience. He coached at Lord Botetourt High School in Daleville, Virginia, where he won 134 games over 14 years. His teams also reached four regional titles and finished as state runner-up three times.Speaking to News 5 WCYB on March 12, Harless made his mindset clear. He said, “Everything has to be moving forward. You can’t look back.” He also shared how he wants to guide his players. “My biggest point to anybody, if you’re going to be the leader of a football team, teach them how to be a real man. You can’t be a great football player unless you know how to act like a real man.”At the same time, he wants the team to enjoy the game. “Kids need to know I’ll have fun with them. I want them to be men, but I want them to have fun,” he added.Principal Jerred Chandler said the school chose Harless because he connects well with students. “He works with the relationships with the kids. He studies the game, he knows the history of the game,” Chandler told WCYB.Meanwhile, Turner was officially removed from his job on February 9. Records show he received $21,226.35 after the allegations became public. School officials explained that such payments can happen due to contract rules and payroll timing, and do not mean he was still working.As the team begins a new chapter under Harless, the search for Turner continues in the background. Police say they are still working both angles, the criminal case and the missing person search, every single day.
Article Summary: Jamie Harless will take over the football program while the search for Travis Turner continues. Turner was last seen on November 20, 2025, near his home in Big Stone Gap, Virginia. His disappearance came just as authorities were preparing to question him. He was charged with five counts related to illegal content involving minors.

Article Title: Rory Mcilroy Masters Menu: Rory McIlroy Reveals Masters Menu Story With Elk Sliders Irish Champ And Emotional Childhood Memories After Historic Grand Slam Win
Article Text:
Rory McIlroy Reveals Masters Menu Story With Elk Sliders Irish Champ And Emotional Childhood Memories After Historic Grand Slam Win (Image via Getty Images)

Rory McIlroy’s Masters dinner menu features elk sliders and tribute to his mother and childhood

The menu is out, and Rory McIlroy has made it personal. Just days before The Masters begins, the world No. 2 has shared what he will serve at the famous Champions Dinner. And it is not just about food. It tells a story about his life, his childhood, and his journey to finally winning the green jacket. The dinner will take place on April 7 at Augusta National Golf Club. It happens two days before the tournament starts. Only past champions attend, along with Augusta National chairman Fred Ridley. As last year’s winner, McIlroy gets to choose the full menu.His choices quickly caught attention. From elk sliders to Irish comfort food, the menu mixes luxury with simple memories.Some dishes are inspired by top restaurants, while others come straight from his childhood. It is a mix that feels both new and deeply personal. And as fans looked closer, one thing became clear. Every item on the menu has a reason behind it.Rory McIlroy did not just pick random dishes. He built this menu step by step, using parts of his life as inspiration. For starters, he chose yellowfin tuna carpaccio, inspired by Le Bernardin, a well-known restaurant he likes.But then, he added something unusual. Elk sliders are part of the appetisers. He explained why, saying, “In the build up to the Masters last year, I was eating a lot of elk. I got this big shipment of elk, and I was eating a lot of that. ”Still, he knew not everyone might like it as a main dish. So he added, “[But] I didn’t want elk to be the main course, because I didn’t know if everyone would like that, so I incorporated it into the appetisers.” Along with that, guests will also get rock shrimp tempura, peach and ricotta flatbread, and bacon-wrapped dates. That last dish is very special. It comes from his mother’s recipe, making it an emotional part of the menu.For the main course, McIlroy has kept things balanced. Guests can choose between Wagyu filet mignon or seared salmon. On the side, he included Irish champ, a dish close to his heart. He shared, “When I was a kid, I used to eat champ by the bowl full. So I’m trying to tie in a little bit of my upbringing.”His close friend Shane Lowry also helped him pick the wines. One of them is a 1990 Bordeaux, known for its high value. To finish, McIlroy went with a classic dessert. Sticky toffee pudding with vanilla ice cream and warm toffee sauce.This dinner also marks a special moment in his career. Last year, McIlroy finally won The Masters after many attempts. He beat Justin Rose in a playoff and completed his career Grand Slam. So this menu is not just about taste. It is about where he came from, what he achieved, and the people who shaped his journey.
Article Summary: Rory McIlroy reveals what he will serve at The Masters Champions Dinner. Elk sliders and Irish Champ are among the dishes on the menu. The dinner will take place on April 7 at Augusta National Golf Club. Only past champions attend, along with Augusta National chairman Fred Ridley.
